title: Remote and Hybrid Work Policy: Eligibility and Expectations
text:
Q: What are the eligibility criteria and expectations for remote and hybrid work?
A: Employees are eligible for remote or hybrid work arrangements after completing their probationary period of 90 days. To request a remote or hybrid work schedule, employees must submit a formal request to their direct supervisor at least two weeks in advance. The request should outline the proposed schedule and how it aligns with team goals. Expectations for remote work include maintaining regular communication with team members, attending all scheduled meetings, and meeting performance objectives. Employees are required to be available during core business hours, which are from 9 AM to 5 PM. Additionally, employees must ensure they have a suitable workspace and reliable internet connection. For any questions or assistance regarding the policy, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
